_comment: Tired Market path enable/disable config. Edit and restart the app to change. Setting enabled=false on a path means: (1) Recommend will skip predictions from that path, (2) the dropdown will return empty if you pick that path. Predictions are still made and stored — the recommendation engine just stops surfacing them. Default state below as of v4.13.39 reflects accuracy matrix data: lottery and penny_lottery have ~3% and 0% hit rates over 76+29 closed predictions, so we pause them while you decide whether to fix or remove. The other paths stay on.

lottery.reason: v4.14.5.55: Speculative is filled again (fill_enabled re-enabled in tm_queue_runner._FILL_DEFAULT_TARGETS — it had drifted off in the AI-timeout era while staying display-enabled here, a contradiction now reconciled). Historically low accuracy (~3% hit rate on early predictions) is disclosed up front by the speculative warning banner, incl. the news-scarcity line; it fills BEHIND the high-yield paths (aggressive/moderate) — by the BUY-rate ordering it edges out slow_safe, so it trails but isn't strictly last; it never starves the high-yield paths. Set enabled=false to hide it from Recommend.
